top_signals.title: 1H 2026 Shipping Market Trends & Highlights
top_signals.summary: The first half of 2026 was defined by the closure of the Strait of Hormuz following US-Israeli military operations against Iran in late February. The disruption rippled across shipping markets: asset values recovered strongly across most segments, ordering activity rebounded across several sectors, and Chinese shipyards further consolidated their dominance. Our 2026 Mid-Year Shipping Market ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China Evergrande liquidators warn PwC partners not to use divorce to shield assets
top_signals.summary: Letter to auditors of failed property group comes after reports of some taking steps to avoid potential damage payouts
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Government delivers fairer deal for shoppers as Buy-Now, Pay-Later rules come into force
top_signals.summary: New rules deliver on government commitment to give Buy-Now, Pay-Later users the same key protections offered by other forms of credit.

top_signals.title: Lucid dismisses report that it is weighing filing for bankruptcy or going private after shares plunge
top_signals.summary: The report said Lucid was considering options that could include going private or filing for bankruptcy protection.

top_signals.title: Solar is sending European power prices on a roller-coaster
top_signals.summary: Daily power-price swings are getting more severe as a flood of solar is quickly followed by a supply crunch.

top_signals.title: The International Gas Union Calls for the Preservation of a Key Production Pathway for Renewable Maritime Fuels
top_signals.summary: To scale bio-LNG bunkering to its full potential, it is essential that any legislative or regulatory measures support principles, such as the liquefaction by equivalence, as this is one of the most effective ways to connect biomethane production with maritime demand at scale.
